member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color
member.summary: RGBA color stored as 4 bytes. Used by . Byte layout matches Stride's Color struct for zero-copy bridge conversion.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.#ctor(System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Byte)
member.summary: RGBA color stored as 4 bytes. Used by . Byte layout matches Stride's Color struct for zero-copy bridge conversion.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.R
member.summary: Red channel (0-255).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.G
member.summary: Green channel (0-255).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.B
member.summary: Blue channel (0-255).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.A
member.summary: Alpha channel (0-255). Defaults to 255 (fully opaque).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color.Transparent
member.summary: Transparent (0, 0, 0, 0).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata
member.summary: Grid-level properties stored alongside the voxel data: name, author, creation date, tags, and voxel scale. Serialized as JSON within the .bvox format metadata section.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata.Name
member.summary: Name of this voxel grid.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata.Author
member.summary: Author of this voxel grid.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata.CreatedAt
member.summary: Creation date of this grid.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata.Tags
member.summary: Descriptive tags for categorization and search.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata.VoxelScale
member.summary: World units per voxel. Arcadia default: 0.25 (one voxel = 25cm cube, ~4x Minecraft resolution). Affects meshing output coordinates and Scene/Mapping integration.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType
member.summary: Material type for a palette entry. Maps to MagicaVoxel MATL chunk types.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType.Diffuse
member.summary: Standard diffuse material.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType.Metal
member.summary: Metallic material with specular reflection.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType.Glass
member.summary: Transparent glass material.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType.Emit
member.summary: Emissive material that produces light.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType.Cloud
member.summary: Volumetric cloud material.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette
member.summary: 256-entry color/material palette shared by all voxels in a grid. Index 0 is always empty (air). Compatible with MagicaVoxel's palette model. The reverse lookup uses the full (Color, MaterialType, Roughness) tuple so that two entries with the same RGB but different materials get separate palette indices.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.UsedCount
member.summary: Number of palette entries in use (excluding index 0 which is always empty).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.Get(System.Byte)
member.summary: Gets the palette entry at the given index.
member.returns: The palette entry at that index.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.Set(System.Byte,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry)
member.summary: Sets the palette entry at the given index. Updates the reverse lookup.
member.param: Palette index (1-255). Index 0 cannot be set.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.GetOrAddIndex(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType,System.Single)
member.summary: Returns the index for an existing entry matching the full (Color, MaterialType, Roughness) tuple, or allocates the next available index if no match exists.
member.returns: The palette index for this entry.
member.exception: Thrown if the palette is full (255 entries used).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.Contains(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType,System.Single)
member.summary: Checks whether the palette contains an entry with the given color, material, and roughness.
member.returns: True if a matching entry exists.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette.Entries
member.summary: Returns a read-only span over the internal entries array. Index 0 is always empty.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry
member.summary: A single entry in the 256-entry palette: color, material type, and roughness.
member.param: Material type (Diffuse, Metal, Glass, Emit, Cloud).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Color,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.MaterialType,System.Single)
member.summary: A single entry in the 256-entry palette: color, material type, and roughness.
member.param: Material type (Diffuse, Metal, Glass, Emit, Cloud).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry.Color
member.summary: RGBA color.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry.Material
member.summary: Material type (Diffuse, Metal, Glass, Emit, Cloud).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry.Roughness
member.summary: Surface roughness (0.0 = smooth/mirror, 1.0 = rough/matte).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.PaletteEntry.Empty
member.summary: An empty palette entry (transparent, diffuse, zero roughness).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel
member.summary: Individual voxel: palette index (1 byte) + flags (1 byte). 2-byte value type designed for zero-allocation pass-by-value in hot paths.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel.#ctor(System.Byte,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags)
member.summary: Individual voxel: palette index (1 byte) + flags (1 byte). 2-byte value type designed for zero-allocation pass-by-value in hot paths.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel.PaletteIndex
member.summary: Palette index. 0 = empty (air), 1-255 = palette entry.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel.Flags
member.summary: Per-voxel property flags.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel.Empty
member.summary: An empty voxel (palette index 0, no flags).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether this voxel is empty (palette index is 0).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk
member.summary: Fixed 16x16x16 voxel volume. Stored as flat byte arrays in XZY memory order: horizontal XZ slices are contiguous, optimizing the greedy mesher's most common scan direction and column-wise terrain voxelization.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.Size
member.summary: Side length of a chunk in voxels.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.TotalVoxels
member.summary: Total number of voxels in a chunk (16^3 = 4096).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.NonEmptyCount
member.summary: Cached count of non-empty voxels in this chunk. Used for quick emptiness checks.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.IsDirty
member.summary: Whether this chunk has been modified since the last serialization or dirty flag clear.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.IsEmpty
member.summary: Whether this chunk contains no non-empty voxels.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.GetFlatIndex(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Computes the flat array index from local chunk coordinates (0-15 each). XZY order: x + z * 16 + y * 256.
member.returns: Flat array index (0-4095).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.GetVoxel(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Gets the voxel at local coordinates within this chunk.
member.returns: The voxel at the specified position.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.SetVoxel(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel)
member.summary: Sets the voxel at local coordinates within this chunk. Updates and marks the chunk as dirty.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk.RecalculateNonEmptyCount
member.summary: Recalculates from the palette index array. Used after bulk writes (deserialization, delta application).

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags
member.summary: Per-voxel property flags stored as a single byte. Bits 5-7 are reserved for game-specific flags.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.None
member.summary: No flags set.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.Hidden
member.summary: Voxel exists but is not rendered (structural support).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.Damaged
member.summary: Visual damage state (cracks, weathering).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.Emissive
member.summary: Emits light using the palette color as light color.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.Transparent
member.summary: Semi-transparent voxel (glass, water).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelFlags.Frozen
member.summary: Boundary-locked voxel. The voxel-builder operation system rejects edits to frozen voxels. VoxelGrid.SetVoxel does NOT enforce this flag — enforcement lives in voxel-builder. This lets generators and the voxelizer write to frozen coordinates during initial setup while preventing player/NPC edits afterward.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid
member.summary: Sparse 3D voxel grid subdivided into 16x16x16 chunks. Primary data structure. Only non-empty chunks are allocated in memory. Thread safety: concurrent read, single-writer.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.Bounds
member.summary: Grid dimensions (may exceed populated area).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.Palette
member.summary: Shared 256-entry color/material palette.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.Metadata
member.summary: Grid-level metadata (name, author, tags, voxel scale).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.VoxelCount
member.summary: Cached count of non-empty voxels across all chunks.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.ChunkCount
member.summary: Number of allocated (non-empty) chunks.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.GridMetadata)
member.summary: Creates a new empty voxel grid with the specified bounds and palette.
member.param: Shared palette. If null, a new empty palette is created.
Grid metadata. If null, default metadata is created.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.GetVoxel(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Gets the voxel at the given coordinate. Returns for coordinates outside the bounds or in unpopulated chunks.
member.returns: The voxel at that position, or .

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.SetVoxel(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Voxel)
member.summary: Sets the voxel at the given coordinate. Creates the chunk on first write. Removes the chunk if it becomes empty. Does NOT enforce the flag.
member.param: The voxel coordinate. Must be within bounds.
member.exception: Thrown if coordinate is outside bounds.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.GetChunk(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord)
member.summary: Gets the chunk at the given chunk coordinate, or null if no chunk exists there.
member.returns: The chunk, or null if empty/unallocated.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.EnumerateChunks
member.summary: Enumerates all non-empty chunks in the grid.
member.returns: Sequence of (ChunkCoord, VoxelChunk) pairs.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.GetDirtyChunks
member.summary: Returns the set of chunk coordinates where the chunk has = true.
member.returns: Set of dirty chunk coordinates.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.ClearDirtyFlags
member.summary: Resets on all chunks.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.IsEmpty(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Whether the voxel at the given coordinate is empty (palette index 0). Returns true for coordinates outside bounds.
member.returns: True if the voxel is empty or outside bounds.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.Contains(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Whether the given coordinate is within the grid bounds.
member.returns: True if within bounds.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid.Chunks
member.summary: Provides direct access to the internal chunk dictionary for serialization.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord
member.summary: Chunk-level coordinate. Each chunk is 16x16x16 voxels. Derived from by floor-division by 16.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Chunk-level coordinate. Each chunk is 16x16x16 voxels. Derived from by floor-division by 16.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.X
member.summary: Chunk X position (voxel X >> 4).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.Y
member.summary: Chunk Y position (voxel Y >> 4).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.Z
member.summary: Chunk Z position (voxel Z >> 4).

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.Zero
member.summary: The origin chunk (0, 0, 0).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.ToVoxelCoord
member.summary: Returns the voxel coordinate of this chunk's minimum corner (lowest X, Y, Z).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord.CompareTo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.ChunkCoord)
member.summary: Comparison for deterministic ordering: Y first, then Z, then X. Matches ordering for consistent chunk iteration.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds
member.summary: Integer axis-aligned bounding box defined by minimum and maximum (both inclusive).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.#ctor(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Integer axis-aligned bounding box defined by minimum and maximum (both inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Min
member.summary: Minimum corner (inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Max
member.summary: Maximum corner (inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Width
member.summary: Width along the X axis (inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Height
member.summary: Height along the Y axis (inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Depth
member.summary: Depth along the Z axis (inclusive).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Volume
member.summary: Total volume of the bounding box in voxels.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Contains(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Tests whether a coordinate is within these bounds (inclusive on all sides).
member.returns: True if the coordinate is within bounds.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Intersects(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds)
member.summary: Tests whether another bounding box overlaps with this one.
member.returns: True if the bounding boxes overlap.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelBounds.Expand(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Returns expanded bounds that include the given coordinate.
member.returns: A new bounds expanded to contain the coordinate.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord
member.summary: Integer 3D voxel coordinate. Uses floor-division for correct negative coordinate handling.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Integer 3D voxel coordinate. Uses floor-division for correct negative coordinate handling.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.X
member.summary: Voxel X position.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.Y
member.summary: Voxel Y position.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.Z
member.summary: Voxel Z position.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.Zero
member.summary: The origin coordinate (0, 0, 0).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.ToChunkCoord
member.summary: Converts this voxel coordinate to a chunk coordinate using floor-division by 16. Arithmetic right shift (>> 4) correctly floors for negative values in C#.
member.returns: The chunk coordinate containing this voxel.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.ToLocalCoord
member.summary: Converts this voxel coordinate to a local coordinate (0-15) within its chunk. Uses floor-modulo to always produce 0-15 even for negative coordinates.
member.returns: Local (x, y, z) each in range [0, 15].

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.op_Addition(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Component-wise addition.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.op_Subtraction(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Component-wise subtraction.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.Distance(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Euclidean distance to another coordinate.
member.returns: The Euclidean distance as a float.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.ManhattanDistance(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Manhattan (taxi-cab) distance to another coordinate.
member.returns: The Manhattan distance.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord.CompareTo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord)
member.summary: Comparison for deterministic ordering: Y first, then Z, then X.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay
member.summary: Integer raycast through a voxel grid using the DDA (Digital Differential Analyzer) algorithm. Reference: Amanatides & Woo, "A Fast Voxel Traversal Algorithm for Ray Tracing" (Eurographics 1987). Steps through voxels along a ray by comparing distances to the next boundary on each axis. Integer arithmetic only in the hot loop.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay.Current
member.summary: Current voxel coordinate the ray is at.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay.LastFace
member.summary: The face normal of the last step (indicates which face of the current voxel was entered).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay.Create(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Creates a new DDA ray from an origin voxel coordinate and a floating-point direction.
member.returns: An initialized ray ready for stepping.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay.Step
member.summary: Advances the ray by one voxel along the axis with the nearest boundary.
member.returns: The new voxel coordinate after stepping.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelRay.Cast(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Casts the ray through a voxel grid, returning the first non-empty voxel hit and the face normal of the entry face.
member.param: The voxel grid to cast through.
Maximum number of voxel steps before giving up.
member.returns: A tuple of (hit coordinate, face normal coordinate) if a non-empty voxel was hit, or null if no hit within maxSteps.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.CulledMesher
member.summary: Per-face culling mesher. Emits faces only where neighbors are empty. Fast, correct, blocky aesthetic. Every voxel engine implements this as baseline. Includes per-vertex ambient occlusion with the anisotropy fix for visual quality.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.GreedyMesher
member.summary: Coplanar face merging mesher. Scans each 2D slice per face direction and finds maximal rectangles of the same material. Typically 5-20x face count reduction. Reference: Mikola Lysenko, "Meshing in a Minecraft Game" (0fps.net, 2012). When AO is enabled, the merge key includes per-vertex AO values to prevent merging faces with different lighting (which would produce incorrect shading).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.GreedyMesher.ComputeFaceAo(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Encodes 4 AO values (each quantized to 0-3) into a single long for fast equality comparison.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.CulledMesherAoOffsets
member.summary: Shared AO corner offset lookup table, reused by CulledMesher and GreedyMesher.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.IMesher
member.summary: Meshing algorithm contract. Converts a to . The 6 neighbor chunks are required for correct face culling and ambient occlusion computation at chunk boundaries.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.IMesher.Mesh(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk[],BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions)
member.summary: Generates mesh data from a voxel chunk and its 6 axis-aligned neighbor chunks.
member.param: The 6 neighbor chunks in order: +X, -X, +Y, -Y, +Z, -Z. Null entries indicate empty neighbors.
The palette to look up colors and materials.
member.returns: Engine-agnostic mesh data.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MarchingCubesMesher
member.summary: Smooth surface extraction from voxel data using the Marching Cubes algorithm. Reference: Lorensen & Cline, "Marching Cubes: A High Resolution 3D Surface Construction Algorithm" (SIGGRAPH 1987). Uses precomputed lookup tables (256 cube configurations). Patent expired 2005. Ambient occlusion is not applicable to marching cubes (smooth surfaces don't have voxel corners); AO output is always null.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData
member.summary: Engine-agnostic mesh output. Each engine bridge converts this to its native format. Right-handed coordinate system, Y-up, counter-clockwise winding order. Colors are stored as bytes (4 per vertex) matching Stride's Color struct.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.Vertices
member.summary: Vertex positions as XYZ triplets (right-handed, Y-up).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.Normals
member.summary: Vertex normals as XYZ triplets.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.UVs
member.summary: UV coordinates as pairs (palette atlas coordinates, texel-centered). Null when is true.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.Indices
member.summary: Triangle indices (CCW winding = front face).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.Colors
member.summary: Per-vertex RGBA colors, 4 bytes each (from palette). Null when is true.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.AmbientOcclusion
member.summary: Per-vertex ambient occlusion values 0.0-1.0. Null if AO is disabled, is true, or the mesher does not support AO (e.g., MarchingCubesMesher).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.VertexCount
member.summary: Number of vertices.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.TriangleCount
member.summary: Number of triangles.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.#ctor(System.Single[],System.Single[],System.Single[],System.Int32[],System.Byte[],System.Single[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new MeshData with the given geometry arrays.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData.Empty
member.summary: An empty mesh with no geometry. Nullable fields are null (not empty arrays) per IMPLEMENTATION TENETS T26: nullable types represent absence, not sentinel values.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers
member.summary: Shared helper methods for mesher implementations.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.FaceDirections
member.summary: Face direction offsets: +X, -X, +Y, -Y, +Z, -Z.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.FaceNormals
member.summary: Face normal vectors as float triplets, matching FaceDirections order.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.FaceVertices
member.summary: Quad vertex offsets for each face direction (4 vertices per face). Each quad is wound CCW (right-handed convention, front-facing). Vertices are in the order: bottom-left, bottom-right, top-right, top-left relative to the face plane.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.IsNeighborEmpty(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether a neighbor voxel at the given local coords (which may be outside the chunk) is empty. Uses the appropriate neighbor chunk for boundary lookups.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.IsSolid(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk[],System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Checks whether the voxel at the given coordinates is solid (non-empty). Handles cross-chunk boundary lookups via the neighbor array.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MesherHelpers.ComputeUV(System.Byte)
member.summary: Computes texel-centered UV coordinates for a palette index in a 16x16 atlas. The +0.5 centers the sample point within the texel, preventing color bleeding.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions
member.summary: Configuration for meshing operations.
member.param: Whether to compute per-vertex ambient occlusion (default true).
When true, skip UVs, colors, and AO — output null for optional arrays. Use for physics collision meshes where only geometry is needed.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions.#ctor(System.Single,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Configuration for meshing operations.
member.param: Whether to compute per-vertex ambient occlusion (default true).
When true, skip UVs, colors, and AO — output null for optional arrays. Use for physics collision meshes where only geometry is needed.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions.VoxelScale
member.summary: World units per voxel (default 0.25).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions.AmbientOcclusion
member.summary: Whether to compute per-vertex ambient occlusion (default true).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions.CollisionMode
member.summary: When true, skip UVs, colors, and AO — output null for optional arrays. Use for physics collision meshes where only geometry is needed.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshingOptions.Default
member.summary: Default meshing options: scale 0.25, AO on, collision off.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshUtility
member.summary: Post-processing utilities for mesh data: winding order flipping for left-handed engines and multi-chunk mesh merging.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshUtility.FlipWindingOrder(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData)
member.summary: Flips the winding order of a mesh from CCW (right-handed) to CW (left-handed). Swaps each triangle's second and third indices: (A, B, C) → (A, C, B) and negates all normals. Use for Unity and Unreal engine bridges.
member.param: The right-handed mesh data to flip.
member.returns: A new MeshData with reversed winding order and negated normals.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshUtility.MergeMeshData(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Math.VoxelCoord}},System.Single)
member.summary: Merges multiple per-chunk meshes into a single MeshData, offsetting vertex positions by each chunk's world-space offset.
member.param: List of (MeshData, VoxelCoord offset) tuples to merge.
World units per voxel for offset conversion.
member.returns: A single merged MeshData.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelCompression
member.summary: RLE (Run-Length Encoding) compression for voxel data. Format: [count, value] pairs where count is 1-255. Runs longer than 255 are split into multiple pairs. Paired with LZ4 for the complete .bvox compression pipeline.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelCompression.RleEncode(System.Byte[])
member.summary: RLE-encodes a byte array. Produces [count, value] pairs.
member.param: Input byte array (typically 4096 bytes for one chunk dimension).
member.returns: RLE-encoded byte array.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelCompression.RleDecode(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Decodes an RLE-encoded byte array back to the original data.
member.param: Expected output length for validation (0 to skip validation).
member.returns: Decoded byte array.
member.exception: Thrown if the encoded data is malformed.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelDelta
member.summary: Binary delta encoding between two states at the chunk level. Identifies added, removed, and modified chunks. Modified chunks are diffed using XOR on their flat arrays. Deterministic: same (old, new) pair always produces identical delta bytes.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelDelta.Compute(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Computes a binary delta between two grid states. Uses dirty flags on the new grid to identify modified chunks efficiently.
member.returns: Binary delta data that can be applied to the old grid to produce the new grid.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelDelta.Apply(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid,System.Byte[])
member.summary: Applies a binary delta to a grid in-place, modifying it to reflect the new state.
member.param: The grid to patch. Modified in-place.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelSerializer
member.summary: Serializes and deserializes to and from the .bvox binary format. The format uses dual-stream RLE + LZ4 compression for compact storage. Deterministic: same VoxelGrid always produces identical .bvox bytes.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelSerializer.Serialize(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelGrid)
member.summary: Serializes a VoxelGrid to the .bvox binary format.
member.returns: The .bvox binary data.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelSerializer.Deserialize(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes a VoxelGrid from .bvox binary data.
member.returns: The reconstructed VoxelGrid.
member.exception: Thrown if the data is invalid or corrupted.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelSerializer.SerializeChunk(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.VoxelChunk)
member.summary: Serializes a single chunk for delta encoding.
member.returns: Compressed chunk data.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Serialization.VoxelSerializer.DeserializeChunk(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Deserializes a single chunk from delta encoding data.
member.returns: The reconstructed chunk.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Tables.MarchingCubesTables
member.summary:
Canonical Marching Cubes lookup tables for isosurface extraction.
These tables encode the standard Marching Cubes algorithm originally described by Lorensen and Cline (SIGGRAPH 1987). The patent (US 4,710,876) expired in 2005 and the tables are in the public domain.
Cube vertex numbering (right-handed, Y-up):
4 -------- 5 /| /| / | / | 7 -------- 6 | | 0 ------|- 1 | / | / |/ |/ 3 -------- 2
Edge numbering:
EdgeVertices
00 - 1
11 - 2
22 - 3
33 - 0
44 - 5
55 - 6
66 - 7
77 - 4
80 - 4
91 - 5
102 - 6
113 - 7
The cube configuration index is an 8-bit value where bit i is set when vertex i is inside the isosurface. maps each configuration to a 12-bit mask of intersected edges. maps each configuration to a list of edge-vertex triples forming triangles.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Tables.MarchingCubesTables.EdgeTable
member.summary: Edge intersection table indexed by cube configuration (0-255). Each entry is a 12-bit mask where bit n indicates that edge n is intersected by the isosurface. A value of 0x000 means the cube is entirely inside or outside the isosurface.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Tables.MarchingCubesTables.TriTable
member.summary: Triangle table indexed by cube configuration (0-255). Each entry is a jagged array of edge indices that form triangles. Every three consecutive values define one triangle (up to 5 triangles per configuration). An empty array indicates no triangles for that configuration.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.HeightmapVoxelizer
member.summary: Converts a 2D heightmap to a by filling columns below sampled height values. Used for terrain overlay creation in the voxel editing workflow.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.HeightmapVoxelizer.Voxelize(System.Single[0:,0:],System.Byte[0:,0:],BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions)
member.summary: Voxelizes a heightmap into a voxel grid. For each (x, z) column, fills voxels from y=0 to the sampled height. Marks border voxels as .
member.param: 2D array indexed [x, z] with world-space height values.
Parallel 2D array [x, z] with palette indices per column. 0 values are replaced with .
The palette to use for the output grid.
Voxelization options (scale, frozen border width, default material).
member.returns: A new VoxelGrid populated from the heightmap data.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.MeshVoxelizer
member.summary: Converts a triangle mesh to a via 3D scan-conversion and ray-parity solid fill. Reference: Nooruddin & Turk, "Simplification and Repair of Polygonal Models Using Volumetric Techniques" (IEEE TVCG, 2003).

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.MeshVoxelizer.Voxelize(BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Meshing.MeshData,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Grid.Palette,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions)
member.summary: Voxelizes a triangle mesh into a voxel grid. Phase 1: surface rasterization by 3D scan-converting each triangle. Phase 2 (if Solid fill mode): ray-parity interior fill. Phase 3: frozen border marking.
member.returns: A new VoxelGrid containing the voxelized mesh.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.MeshVoxelizer.PointTriangleDistance(System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: Computes the minimum distance from a point to a triangle in 3D space.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelFillMode
member.summary: Fill mode for mesh voxelization.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelFillMode.Surface
member.summary: Only the surface shell of the mesh is voxelized.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelFillMode.Solid
member.summary: The surface shell and the solid interior are both voxelized using ray-parity fill.

member.name: T:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions
member.summary: Configuration for voxelization operations.
member.param: Surface shell only, or solid-filled interior (default Solid).
Voxels from grid edge to mark as Frozen (default 1).
Fallback material when source has no color data.

member.name: M:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.#ctor(System.Single,BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelFillMode,System.Int32,System.Byte)
member.summary: Configuration for voxelization operations.
member.param: Surface shell only, or solid-filled interior (default Solid).
Voxels from grid edge to mark as Frozen (default 1).
Fallback material when source has no color data.

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.VoxelScale
member.summary: World units per voxel (default 0.25).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.FillMode
member.summary: Surface shell only, or solid-filled interior (default Solid).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.FrozenBorderWidth
member.summary: Voxels from grid edge to mark as Frozen (default 1).

member.name: P:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.DefaultPaletteIndex
member.summary: Fallback material when source has no color data.

member.name: F:BeyondImmersion.Bannou.VoxelCore.Voxelization.VoxelizationOptions.Default
member.summary: Default voxelization options.
